title: THE ROLE OF COMBATING CUSTOMS CRIMES IN ENSURING  THE ECONOMIC SECURITY OF THE REPUBLIC  OF UZBEKISTAN
author: MAMATOV, Shukhrat
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This scientific article examines the enhancement of the organizational and legal framework for investigative activities in detecting customs-related crimes in the Republic of Uzbekistan. Specifically, it discusses the practical and legal challenges associated with identifying offenses in the customs sector and presents proposals for their resolution.
steps_raw: This scientific article examines the enhancement of the organizational and legal framework for investigative activities in detecting customs-related crimes in the Republic of Uzbekistan. Specifically, it discusses the practical and legal challenges associated with identifying offenses in the customs sector and presents proposals for their resolution.
keywords: customs crime, customs law violation, criminal procedure, Code of Criminal Procedure, Criminal
